'''Najoons''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of nocturnal avians that were native to the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]]. They varied in size from a quarter to half a meter long, with wingspans ranging from forty-five to seventy centimeters. They possessed dark black hides that effectively hid them from both predators and prey.

A flock of najoons caused the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] ''[[Star-Beast]]'' to make a dangerous forced landing on the Forest Moon.

==Appearances==
